hardware: M2 MacBook Pro, 16GB RAM, Apple NVMe SSD
note: Numbers are estimated — benchmarks are runnable with `cargo bench` from labs/document-db/

benchmarks.note: HashMap insert + UUID generation. No I/O. Limited by allocation.
O(n) scan with equality check per field. Memory-resident.
Encoding overhead + buffered file append. No fsync per insert.
O(log N) BTreeMap lookup + single doc fetch by offset. 11x faster than full scan.
Extra BTreeMap update per insert. Grows linearly with number of indexes.
